result.summary: Found 2 visual issues. The main problem is a floating "SCROLL DOWN" overlay covering the legal text at the bottom, and the fine print itself is extremely hard to read.

issues.description: A large "SCROLL DOWN" banner is floating over the lower part of the page and obscures the disclaimer/legal copy beneath it.
issues.suggestion: Move the scroll prompt away from the text block or reduce its size/opacity so it does not cover important legal content.

issues.description: The fine print at the bottom is extremely small and low-contrast, making it difficult to read.
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size and spacing of the disclaimer text, and ensure sufficient contrast so it remains legible.
